label: Strategy List
description: Grouped strategy card grid with filters, performance metrics, sparklines, and action links per strategy.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.8.note: error surfaced at WidgetErrorBoundary level; StrategiesDataProvider silently falls back to mock data.

1.1.note: data from useStrategiesData() only, no inline fetch.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and filters via getStrategyIdsForScope + getClientIdsForOrgs.

1.3.note: org filter change → scopeClientIds rebuilds → strategies re-filtered.

1.4.note: client filter cascades via getClientIdsForOrgs in context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (shows live strategy statuses), paper ✓ (shows paper strategy cards), batch ✓ (shows historical snapshot).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode(); isLoading is mode-aware.

3.5.note: Paper mode: View Live, Details, Config action buttons still visible — acceptable for a catalogue that links to other views.

3.3.note: Human verify: in batch mode, View Live button behavior (should it be disabled?).

3.4.note: Human verify: batch indicator visible when in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks done. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4 — particularly whether 'View Live' button should be disabled in batch mode.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers. All onClick handlers are functional (filter toggles, clear filters, show/hide filters).

4.2.note: Links checked: /positions?strategy_id=${strategy.id} — route is at /services/trading/positions (different path). /services/trading/strategies/${strategy.id} — [id] route exists. /config/strategies/${strategy.id} — no /config/strategies route found in app/. Flag for L4 human verification.

4.5.note: 3 link targets verified: /services/trading/strategies/[id] exists. /positions?strategy_id= redirects to /services/trading/positions (query param routing — may work via middleware or layout). /config/strategies/[id] route NOT found in app/ — possible 404. Human must verify.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: strategy cards show all relevant fields (name, description, venues, metrics, sparkline).

4.4.note: Human verify: filter dropdowns work (Asset Class, Archetype, Status).

4.7.note: Human verify: CollapsibleSection toggles per asset class group.

4.8.note: Human verify: card grid scrolls within widget bounds.

l4.notes: L4 FLAG: /config/strategies/[id] route not found in app/. Human must verify 4.3, 4.4, 4.5 (route targets), 4.7, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all 65+ strategies across DeFi, CeFi, TradFi, Sports, Predictions. Widget is the primary catalogue/discovery surface for all strategy types.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. Human must walk through 5.2-5.6 — particularly cross-asset-class filter combinations.

l6.notes: L6 not started — deferred until L5 human walkthrough complete.

7.1.note: strategies-catalogue-widget.tsx:278 — hover:shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] retained as widget-local inline hover elevation. Not promoted to a cross-widget token.
7.1.deferReason: shadow-hover is widget-local, not a cross-widget token — accepted inline implementation

7.2.note: No mock data in widget; data from context. ARCHETYPES/STATUSES from lib/config/.

7.3.note: 401 lines — within 500 limit. No single function > 200 lines.

7.4.note: PascalCase, kebab-case file, useCamelCase hooks. Compliant.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: ResizeObserver in useEffect has stable deps. useMemo deps are primitive values. CLEAN.

l7.notes: 7.1 deferred (shadow rgba). 7.5 globally deferred. All other checks pass.

8.1.note: Replaced 9 text-[10px] instances with text-micro and 1 text-[9px] with text-nano. --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) and --text-nano (0.5625rem/9px) are defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro (×9) and text-[9px] → text-nano (×1) via replace_all.

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, CardHeader (ui), Button (ui), Input (ui), Badge (ui), DropdownMenu (ui), CollapsibleSection (shared). Shared primitives used.

8.4.note: 3 plain <button> elements without aria-label — fixed: added type='button' + aria-label to filter toggle, asset class chip remove, archetype chip remove buttons.
8.4.fix: Added type='button' and aria-label attributes to all 3 interactive button elements

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=6, minH=6. Narrow mode (grid-cols-1) activates at <560px container width via ResizeObserver.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro/text-nano tokens applied). 8.3 pass. 8.4 fixed (aria-labels added). 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Primary catalogue/discovery widget for all strategies. Driving widget that links to detail pages and config panels. Merging would lose the card-grid browsing UX.

relationships.notes: Master widget — strategy card click drives navigation to /services/trading/strategies/[id] and /config/strategies/[id]. Strategy selection in catalogue could potentially drive cefi-strategy-config widget in future (not yet wired).

dataContract.notes: Strategy list served from strategy registry (local) with scope-filtered seed data from mock-data-index. Production: should fetch from strategy management service with live status/performance data.

gaps: /config/strategies/[id] route may not exist — needs verification
View Live button links to /positions not /services/trading/positions
sparklineData not connected to real performance history
Performance metrics (Sharpe, Return, Max DD) are from strategy registry static data
coverage.notes: Largest widget in domain (401 lines). Most complex — covers all asset classes and 65+ strategies.

findings.description: strategies-catalogue-widget.tsx:278 — hover:shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] contains rgba() literal; no --shadow-hover token in globals.css
findings.deferReason: shadow-hover is widget-local, not a cross-widget token — accepted inline implementation

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: strategies-catalogue-widget.tsx — text-[10px] (×9 instances) and text-[9px] (×1 instance); no text-2xs/text-3xs tokens in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px) at all 9 sites and text-[9px] with text-nano (--text-nano=0.5625rem/9px) at the 1 instruction-type chip site.

findings.description: strategies-catalogue-widget.tsx:80,210,221 — 3 plain <button> elements without type='button' or aria-label (filter toggle, asset class chip remove, archetype chip remove)
findings.fix: Added type='button' and aria-label to filter toggle button; added aria-label to asset class and archetype chip remove buttons

findings.description: strategies-catalogue-widget.tsx:371 — Link href='/config/strategies/${strategy.id}' — no /config/strategies route found in app/; possible 404
findings.deferReason: route existence requires human browser verification — may be behind (ops) route group
